site.name: CONTINUUM SPACE
site.description:
Dive into multidisciplinary works
across Architecture, Computation, and Art.

content.data: This project explores urban flow and structural loads.

The BIM dashboard remains interactive in the hero section while this stream can hold research notes, project narrative, and references.

All content is still mapped from database.json and rendered by block type rules.
Black ink on 40x40 canvas. Expanding on the concept of negative space.
